english: love (between a man and a woman)

etymology.description: 愛(愛) (ài, "love") refers to a deep affection or attachment, often in a romantic sense, and 情(情) (qíng, "emotion; feeling") encompasses feelings and emotions. Combined, 愛情(愛情) (àiqíng, "love") specifically denotes the romantic love between individuals.
etymology.interpretation: The combination of 愛(愛) (ài, "love") and 情(情) (qíng, "emotion; feeling") makes sense as it captures the essence of romantic love, which is both an emotion and an expression of deep affection.

examples.chinese: 他们的爱情故事让人感动(他們的愛情故事讓人感動)。
examples.pinyin: Tāmen de àiqíng gùshì ràng rén gǎndòng.

examples.chinese: 爱情需要时间来培养(愛情需要時間來培養)。
她相信爱情能改变一切(她相信愛情能改變一切)。
examples.pinyin: Tā xiāngxìn àiqíng néng gǎibiàn yīqiè.
examples.english: She believes love can change everything.
